text:
Long ago in the kingdom of Serenia... there was a wise old owl perched in the great oak tree near the castle. The owl was known far and wide as Whisper—a storyteller whose tales drew curious mice and sleepy birds alike.

One crisp autumn night, just as the stars began their nightly chorus...

A squirrel whirred through the foliage. Squeak! A song bird!

Aha!

Wise old Whisper fluttered down from his tree perches.

"My dear squirrel," Whisper crooned, "there’s a tale I’ve been saving. About a daring princess named Princess Featherheart. She longed for more than the shiny trinkets of court life.

So one moonlit night—

Oh my!

A shadow raced across the castle battlements!

She had glimpsed a shadowy figure slipping through the gardener's tulip patch! The figure stopped—a prince whose eyes mirrored hers. They exchanged glances, stars dancing in their eyes...

"What do you seek so dearly
